falsification_conditions.condition: The S&P 500 closes above 5000 in the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sharp upward breakout would contradict the 'HOLD' signal and indicate a bullish phase, invalidating the current verdict.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score exceeds 60 within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A blowoff score above 60 would confirm a market top, directly contradicting the 'HOLD' signal and pattern similarity to a bottom pattern.

falsification_conditions.condition: The 20-day moving average of the Nasdaq 100 crosses above the 50-day moving average by 5% or more
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: This bullish crossover would indicate a confirmed uptrend, falsifying the 'HOLD' verdict and suggesting a phase shift to bullish momentum.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
